tree.text: Ella & Chen Jie's folding fan conversation

children.text: Oh, what's that, Chen Jie? It's so beautiful!
children.cn: 噢，那是什么，陈洁？它太漂亮了！
children.statement: 艾拉觉得陈洁手里的东西非常漂亮。
children.explanation: 艾拉赞叹道：'It's so beautiful!' (它太漂亮了！)。陈述正确。

children.text: Thanks. It's a folding fan. I bought it last year.
children.cn: 谢谢。这是一把折扇。我去年买的。
children.statement: 这把折扇是陈洁最近刚刚买的。
children.explanation: 陈洁说：'I bought it last year.' (我去年买的)。陈述错误。

children.text: Oh! It has a painting of bamboo on it.
children.explanation: 艾拉说：'It has a painting of bamboo on it.' (上面画着竹子)。陈述错误。

children.text: Yeah. Bamboo is one of the most popular subjects in Chinese paintings. It's a symbol of goodness in Chinese culture.
children.cn: 是的。竹子是中国画中最受欢迎的题材之一。在中国文化中，它是美德的象征。
children.statement: 竹子在中国画中是很罕见的题材。
children.explanation: 陈洁提到：'Bamboo is one of the most popular subjects...' (竹子是最受欢迎的题材之一)。陈述错误。

children.text: I didn't know that before. So, where did you get that fan?
children.cn: 我以前不知道这回事。那么，你从哪里买到这把扇子的？
children.statement: 艾拉以前就知道竹子在中国文化中的特殊含义。
children.explanation: 艾拉说：'I didn't know that before.' (我以前不知道)。陈述错误。

children.text: At the Bamboo Sea in Sichuan, the largest and oldest bamboo forest in China. I learnt lots of interesting things when I was there.
children.cn: 在四川的蜀南竹海，中国最大、最古老的竹林。我在那里的时候学到了很多有趣的事情。
children.statement: 蜀南竹海是中国最大、最年轻的竹林。
children.explanation: 陈洁说那是 'largest and oldest' (最大和最古老) 的竹林，而不是最年轻的。陈述错误。

children.statement: 艾拉对陈洁学到的趣事不感兴趣。
children.explanation: 艾拉追问道 'Like what?' (比如什么？)，表现出极大的兴趣。陈述错误。

children.text: Well, bamboo is one of the fastest-growing plants. Some bamboo can grow almost one metre in one day. Also, it's one of the most useful plants in the world. People can use it to build houses and make tools and instruments.
children.cn: 嗯，竹子是生长最快的植物之一。有些竹子一天几乎能长一米。此外，它是世界上最实用的植物之一。人们可以用它来盖房子，制造工具和乐器。
children.statement: 竹子可以在一天内长高近一米。
children.explanation: 陈洁明确说：'grow almost one metre in one day' (一天内几乎能长一米)。陈述正确。

children.text: Oh, that's interesting. I remember pandas love to eat bamboo too, right?
children.cn: 噢，那很有趣。我记得大熊猫也喜欢吃竹子，对吧？
children.statement: 艾拉提到熊猫喜欢吃竹叶和竹茎。
children.explanation: 艾拉提问大熊猫是否也爱吃竹子。陈述正确。

children.text: Exactly! Actually we eat bamboo shoots too. They're really delicious.
children.cn: 没错！其实我们也吃竹笋。它们真的很美味。
children.explanation: 陈洁说：'Actually we eat bamboo shoots too.' (实际上我们也吃竹笋)，它们很美味。陈述错误。
